description: Fisher information scalar curvature |R| for the 3D Heisenberg model on L x L x L periodic cubic torus at beta_c

data.note: A100 campaign (10/10 JK, 1M samples). Independent H100 campaign: |R|=3667 +/- 29 (9/10 JK). Two campaigns agree within 1.13 sigma.

notes.method_detail: Wolff cluster algorithm with FFT-accelerated Fisher matrix computation, 1M total samples with jackknife error estimation
notes.d_eff_definition: d_eff(L1 -> L2) = log(|R(L2)|/|R(L1)|) / (3 * log(L2/L1)), where 3 = spatial dimension
notes.convergence: d_eff oscillates around target 1.017. d_eff(9->10) = 0.954 (cross-campaign); d_eff(8->10) = 0.993 (cross-campaign). All using L=4-9 from H100, L=10 from A100.
notes.two_campaigns: L=10 measured independently on H100 (|R|=3667 +/- 29, 9/10 JK) and A100 (|R|=3614 +/- 37, 10/10 JK). Tension: 1.13 sigma (consistent).
notes.compute: L=4-8 on RTX 4090; L=9 on RunPod H100; L=10 on RunPod A100

papers: Paper #7: Curvature & Vacuum Einstein (submitted, on hold)
